definition:
1. of  or in the country , (Aristophanes Comicus), etc. 
2. of men, dwelling in the country, a countryman, rustic , (Aristophanes Comicus); then, opposite to ἀστεῖος, clownish, boorish, rude , (Aristophanes Comicus); the character of the ἄγροικος is described by (Theophrastus Philosophus) 
3. adverb -κως, (Aristophanes Comicus); comparative -οτέρως, (Plato Philosophus); but -ότερον, (Plato Philosophus) 
4. of land, rough, uncultivated , (Thucydides) (ML)
